headline: BofA Lifts PT on The TJX Companies, Inc. (TJX) to $175 From $168 – Here’s Why
summary: The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) is one of the best stocks that will always grow. BofA lifted the price target on The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) to $175 from $168 on February 26, reiterating a Buy rating on the shares. The firm stated that the company beat on margins and sales, provided initial FY27 guidance, […]
